name: UnderstandBill
description: Customer wants to understand what they are being charged for, needs a breakdown or explanation of their bill, or is asking about the amount they owe — they are not disputing a charge or requesting a copy of their bill.

sampleUtterances.utterance: Can you help me understand my {billingPeriod} bill?
I need a breakdown of my {billingPeriod} bill
Walk me through what I'm being charged for
How much is my {billingPeriod} bill?
Can you explain each line on my {billingPeriod} bill?
I don't understand why my bill is this amount
What am I actually paying for?
Go through my {billingPeriod} bill with me
Why has my bill gone up from last month?
I'd like to know how much my {billingPeriod} bill is
What does each charge on my bill mean?
My bill looks different this month — can you explain?
I'm confused about my {billingPeriod} bill
How much do I owe this month?
Can you tell me what the total is on my {billingPeriod} bill?
There are some charges I don't recognise — can you explain them?
What's included in the amount I'm paying?
I've just received my {billingPeriod} bill and I'm not sure what everything means
help me read my bill
Why is there a difference between my {billingPeriod} bill and the one before?
